data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm that the required field scopes (booking-level, customer profile, service configuration, provider profile) are satisfied. While the linked use case mentions various field types, it does not explicitly address the required scopes, leading to a gap in validation. The absence of specific evidence regarding the implementation of these scopes means the requirement is not fully covered.
gaps: Field scopes: booking-level, customer profile, service configuration, provider profile are not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
